name: Gilmer Country Club
description: Gilmer Country Club is a place to play pickleball in Gilmer, TX. There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A membership is required to play.

name: Gladewater Park Courts
description: Come play pickleball at Gladewater Park Courts in Gladewater, TX! There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms, water, and lights. The courts are free.

name: Pickle Haus
description: Come play pickleball at Pickle Haus in Big Sandy, TX!
